channel.title: github python on Guixian 的日常记录
channel.description: Recent content in github python on Guixian 的日常记录

item.title: GitHub 2021 年 9 月热门 Python 项目
item.description: yt-dlp url https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp 简介 A youtube-dl fork with additional features and fixes star 数量 6359 MockingBird url https://github.com/babysor/MockingBird 简介 🚀AI拟声: 5秒内克隆您的声音并生成任意语音内容 Clone a voice in 5 seconds to generate arbitrary speech in real-time star 数量 4285 Real-ESRGAN url https://github.com/xinntao/Real-ESRGAN 简介 Real-ESRGAN aims at
